title: display_name in og:title meta tag not attribute-escaped
description: activitypub.rs profile_page and post_page: display_name is sanitized with ammonia::clean() (strips HTML tags) but not html_attr_escape(). ammonia::clean() does NOT escape double quotes in its string output, so a display_name containing a " character breaks out of the content="..." attribute in og:title meta tags. Trigger: set display_name to 'foo" onload="alert(1)' via update_credentials API. Impact: HTML injection in profile/post pages for crawlers that render meta tags. Fix: apply html_attr_escape() to display_name before interpolating into attribute contexts.
